_comment_target: 10-video × 2-epoch single-GPU smoke test for the EgoWM-style legacy variant. Mirrors train_drrobot_1k_10vids.json but with legacy_render_variant='egowm' (per-token spatial render encoder, no gate, no fuse — direct additive to per-token temb per EgoWM Eq. 5–6). Use this BEFORE committing to the full 8xL40 run to verify the egowm architecture trains cleanly (no NaN, no crash, gates / encoder weights sane after a few steps).
_precompute_cache_note: Same 10-video data + frames + res as the legacy v1 smoke → cache HITS instantly (cache key is data-only, not architecture-dependent).
